text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: One, two, three... One... One, two, three,<n>four...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Phew... Huff, huff... Three setscomplete... I think that amount ofweight should do it...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I watch from the sidelines as Mejiro<n>Ardan goes through
her workout. It's<n>on the lighter side in terms of<n>intensity,
and it's clear she's taking<n>things slowly.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In between each exercise, I see her<n>pull out a tablet and
swipe the screen.<n>I wonder what she's doing...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to pump some<n>iron—whoa! It's packed in here!
Uh...<n>are there any open spaces?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. You can use this space if<n>you'd like. I've just
finished my<n>workout.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Really?! Man, this is my lucky day!<n>Thanks a lot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You're very welcome. Now then, I'll<n>be on my way.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: Wait, she's done already? But she<n>just got here!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Well... She's not the healthiest, right?<n>Maybe that's the best
she can do.

text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She may be a Mejiro, but her poor<n>health overshadows her
family line...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. Forcing her to push herself<n>would be dangerous
too... She's just<n>not built for the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems Tazuna was right. The<n>trainers obviously don't
believe Ardan<n>has what it takes to be a racer.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With that thought, I decide to follow<n>Mejiro Ardan out of the
gym, hoping<n>to chat with her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro Ardan falls to the ground, I<n>rush to her side,
steadying her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, my apologies for worrying<n>you. I just felt a little
lightheaded, but<n>I'm fine now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I suppose I worked a little too<n>hard. I was only
discharged<n>yesterda—oh? Where's my tablet?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I scan the area around me, and my<n>eyes fall on a square
object right by<n>my feet—the very tablet I saw Ardan<n>
looking at in the gym.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I take the tablet into my hands, the<n>screen lights up, and
I'm taken aback<n>by what I see.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Displaying on the screen is a<n>spreadsheet. Under each
exercise are<n>notes on the method, reps, sets,<n>weight used,
as well as her tempo...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even at a glance, it's abundantly<n>clear... She's dead set on
seeing just<n>how far she can go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for picking that up for me...<n>May I have it back
now?
choice_data_list: Ah, of course! Sorry about that.
Ah, of course! Sorry about that.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan takes back her tablet<n>before walking off. In
my stupor, I<n>completely forgot that I wanted to talk<n>to her.
Instead, I just stare as she<n>takes her leave.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even the standard exercises push<n>her body to the limit, but
that doesn't<n>stop her from trying. That<n>spreadsheet must
be only the<n>beginning of her resolve.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Now hold on... Are you sure, Ardan?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Several days pass until I see Mejiro<n>Ardan again, where I
find her standing<n>before a very concerned Tazuna.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There should be an open slot, no? If<n>so, I would like to take
it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Please let the staff know that I will be<n>racing in the
1,200-meter on the dirt<n>course.
choice_data_list: (The dirt course?! And why a sprint?!)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe my ears. I've looked<n>into Mejiro Ardan's
aptitudes, and<n>what I'm hearing doesn't—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But you're more suited to<n>medium-distance races on a turf<n>
course! I'm not saying it's<n>impossible for you to win, but
your<n>true potential won't shine through!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ardan... Perhaps you could wait for<n>the next tryouts in a few
months? That<n>way, you can enter a race better<n>suited to
your talents and—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But those "few months" make a<n>world of difference... I
believe you and<n>I are both aware of what I mean.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We Umamusume can only shine for<n>so long. Once we're
race-ready, our<n>talents can only decline from there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My repeated hospitalizations have<n>prevented me from
running in the<n>tryouts... As such, the time I have<n>after I am
race-ready has been<n>decreased significantly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If I delay my debut any longer, my<n>prime will be over before
I can even<n>dream of the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I... don't want that to happen.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But!
